text:
(a) If the administrative law judge finds in the affirmative on each issue under Section 724.042 (Issues at Hearing) , the suspension order is sustained. If the person is a resident without a license, the department shall continue to deny to the person the issuance of a license for the applicable period provided by Section 724.035 (Suspension or Denial of License) .

(b) If the administrative law judge does not find in the affirmative on each issue under Section 724.042 (Issues at Hearing) , the department shall reinstate the person’s license or rescind any order denying the issuance of a license because of the person’s refusal to submit to the taking of a specimen under Section 724.032 (Officer’s Duties for License Suspension; Written Refusal Report) (a).
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 724. Implied Consent
##### § 724.043 — Findings of Administrative Law Judge

(a) If the administrative law judge finds in the affirmative on each issue under Section 724.042 (Issues at Hearing) , the suspension order is sustained. If the person is a resident without a license, the department shall continue to deny to the person the issuance of a license for the applicable period provided by Section 724.035 (Suspension or Denial of License) .

(b) If the administrative law judge does not find in the affirmative on each issue under Section 724.042 (Issues at Hearing) , the department shall reinstate the person’s license or rescind any order denying the issuance of a license because of the person’s refusal to submit to the taking of a specimen under Section 724.032 (Officer’s Duties for License Suspension; Written Refusal Report) (a).

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 766 (H.B.4528), Sec. 6, eff. September 1, 2023.*

subsections.label: a

If the person is a resident without a license, the department shall continue to deny to the person the issuance of a license for the applicable period provided by Section 724.035 (Suspension or Denial of License) .

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: If the administrative law judge does not find in the affirmative on each issue under Section 724.042 (Issues at Hearing) , the department shall reinstate the person’s license or rescind any order denying the issuance of a license because of the person’s refusal to submit to the taking of a specimen under Section 724.032 (Officer’s Duties for License Suspension; Written Refusal Report) (a).
